text:
On Wed, 2 Jun 2010 15:57:16 GMT, miwi wrote

Hi Miwi,

> State-Changed-Why: 
> patch reject please resend a full patch as attachment. thanks

The patch is rejected because of recent gettext's PORTREVISION bump.

Find attached a full, up-to-date, patch that updates lftp from v4.0.5 to v4.0.8.

Best regards,

Ganaël LAPLANCHE
